info.title: SkillSphere API
info.description: Production-level MVC backend API documentation for SkillSphere platform.

201.description: User registered successfully, verification email dispatched.

example.message: User registered successfully. Please verify your email address.

400.description: Validation error (missing fields, invalid email format, short password).

example.message: Name, email, and password are required

409.description: User with this email already exists.

example.message: User with this email already exists

200.description: Login successful. Access and refresh tokens returned as HTTP-only cookies and in the JSON body.

403.description: Email not verified or account suspended.

example.message: Please verify your email before logging in

get.summary: Verify email via token

example.message: Email verified successfully. You can now log in.

400.description: Email already verified or user not found.

example.message: Password reset token sent to email
User with this email does not exist

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Password reset token sent to email

example.message: Password reset successfully. You can now log in.
Password reset token is invalid or has expired

post.summary: Logout current user and clear sessions

401.description: Access token not provided or invalid.

get.summary: Get logged-in user profile details
Initiate Google OAuth flow

302.description: Redirects user to Google OAuth server authentication page.

get.summary: Google OAuth OAuth Redirect Callback

302.description: Redirects back to frontend with attached session cookie.

patch.summary: Update user core details and upload credentials
patch.description: Supports updating bio, location, languages, experience, education, and uploading files.

bio.example: Fullstack Node developer with 5 years experience.

data.bio: Fullstack Node developer with 5 years experience.

example.message: Invalid experience format. Must be a valid JSON array.

400.description: Hourly rate negative or required field missing.

200.description: Action processed. If accepted, status changes to Accepted.

200.description: Recommended freelancers successfully computed and returned.
